T0017.title: Flash Sale
T0017.definition: A homophone for 'flash sale,' referring to time-limited promotional discounts in marketing campaigns. In the context of coupon fraud, such homophonic or stylized variations of everyday terms are widely used.
T0017.description: A homophone for 'flash sale,' referring to time-limited promotional discounts in marketing campaigns. In the context of coupon fraud, such homophonic or stylized variations of everyday terms are widely used.
T0017.usageExample: 昨晚那个半价茅台活动，脚本哥直接秒杀了几百单，我们手动根本抢不到。
